meta.title: Hel Caawimaad Sharci Socdaal — SafePassage
meta.description: Hel wakiillo iyo hay'addo caawimaad sharci bilaash ah.

pageSubtitle: Dhammaan la-taliyeyaasha halkan lagu muujiyay waxaa maamula SRA, OISC, ama waa sanadlayaasha diiwaan-gashan. Marnaba ha u adeegsanin la-taliye socdaal aan la maamulin.
resultsFree: Caawimaad Bilaash ah oo Kheyraad ah
noResults: Ma jiraan la-taliyayaal ku wajahan shaandhaynahaaga. Isku day inaad beddesho raadintaada.

badges.label: SRA Maamusan
badges.desc: Wakiillo Xukuumadda Hay'adda Sharci waxay ogol tahay oo maamusho

badges.label: OISC Diiwaan-gashan
badges.desc: Xafiiska Komishinarka Adeegyada Socdaalka ayaa diiwaan-gashan

badges.label: Sanadlaha Diiwaan-gashan
badges.desc: Sanadlaha UK-ga diiwaan-gashan ee bixiya adeegyada bilaashka ah ama kharashka hooseeya

badges.label: UNHCR
badges.desc: Hay'ad UNHCR ansixisay ama la xiriirta

guideCtaTitle: Hagaha buuxa marka hore miyaad u baahan tahay?
guideCtaText: Akhriso hagaheena faahfaahsan ka hor intaadan la-taliye la tashanin.
warningText: Isticmaalka la-taliye socdaal aan la maamulin waa sharci-darro oo khatar ah. Hubso in la-taliyaha aad isticmaalsho uu ku jiro diiwaanka SRA ama OISC kahor inta aadan bixin lacag.
